changes.value:
## What
Create `swissarmyhammer-search/src/semantic.rs` — embedding-based semantic search using the existing `TextEmbedder` trait and `simsimd` cosine similarity.

Patterns to follow:
- `swissarmyhammer-treesitter/src/chunk.rs:283-294` (cosine_similarity)
- `swissarmyhammer-embedding/src/embedder.rs` (Embedder usage)
- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/search_code.rs` (search_code pattern)

Implementation:
- Store embeddings as `HashMap<String, Vec<f32>>` (doc_id → vector)
- `build_embeddings(docs, embedder)` — embed concatenated fields+body for each doc
- `semantic_search(query_embedding, stored_embeddings, limit) -> Vec<SearchResult>`
- Use `simsimd::SpatialSimilarity::cosine()` for similarity
- Return top-k by descending similarity, with min_similarity threshold (0.3)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `build_embeddings()` produces one embedding per document
- [ ] `semantic_search()` returns documents ranked by cosine similarity
- [ ] Results have `strategy: Semantic` and normalized scores
- [ ] Handles case where embedder is not loaded (returns error, doesn't panic)

## Tests
- [ ] `test_semantic_search_basic` — mock embeddings, verify ranking by cosine similarity
- [ ] `test_semantic_search_threshold` — results below threshold excluded
- [ ] `test_semantic_search_empty_index` — returns empty for no documents
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-search semantic`

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,26 +1,21 @@
 ## What
-Create `swissarmyhammer-search/src/semantic.rs` — embedding-based semantic search using the existing `TextEmbedder` trait and `simsimd` cosine similarity.
-
-Patterns to follow:
-- `swissarmyhammer-treesitter/src/chunk.rs:283-294` (cosine_similarity)
-- `swissarmyhammer-embedding/src/embedder.rs` (Embedder usage)
-- `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/search_code.rs` (search_code pattern)
+Create `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/semantic.rs` — embedding-based semantic search over Entity objects using `TextEmbedder` trait from `model-embedding` and `model_embedding::cosine_similarity`.

 Implementation:
-- Store embeddings as `HashMap<String, Vec<f32>>` (doc_id → vector)
-- `build_embeddings(docs, embedder)` — embed concatenated fields+body for each doc
+- Store embeddings as `HashMap<EntityId, Vec<f32>>` (entity id → vector)
+- `build_embeddings(entities, embedder)` — for each entity, concatenate all string field values + body, embed the result
 - `semantic_search(query_embedding, stored_embeddings, limit) -> Vec<SearchResult>`
-- Use `simsimd::SpatialSimilarity::cosine()` for similarity
+- Use `model_embedding::cosine_similarity()` (from card 0)
 - Return top-k by descending similarity, with min_similarity threshold (0.3)

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `build_embeddings()` produces one embedding per document
-- [ ] `semantic_search()` returns documents ranked by cosine similarity
+- [ ] `build_embeddings()` produces one embedding per entity
+- [ ] `semantic_search()` returns entities ranked by cosine similarity
 - [ ] Results have `strategy: Semantic` and normalized scores
-- [ ] Handles case where embedder is not loaded (returns error, doesn't panic)
+- [ ] Handles case where embedder is not loaded gracefully

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `test_semantic_search_basic` — mock embeddings, verify ranking by cosine similarity
+- [ ] `test_semantic_search_basic` — mock embeddings, verify ranking
 - [ ] `test_semantic_search_threshold` — results below threshold excluded
-- [ ] `test_semantic_search_empty_index` — returns empty for no documents
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-search semantic`
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `test_semantic_search_empty_index` — returns empty for no entities
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-entity-search semantic`
\ No newline at end of file

+- `build_embeddings(docs, embedder)` — embed concatenated fields+body for each doc
 - `semantic_search(query_embedding, stored_embeddings, limit) -> Vec<SearchResult>`
-- Use `model_embedding::cosine_similarity()` (from card 0)
+- Use `simsimd::SpatialSimilarity::cosine()` for similarity
 - Return top-k by descending similarity, with min_similarity threshold (0.3)

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] `semantic_search()` returns entities ranked by cosine similarity
